title: Advanced Marketing
description: advmkt.com.mx zoominfo.com/c/advanced-marketing/546978407 Advanced Marketing is one of Mexico's largest book distribution and publishing companies, founded in 1994. It partners with around 70 national and international publishing houses to supply major retail chains like Gandhi and Porrúa. Additionally, it operates "AMS Libros," an online store selling a wide variety of children's, art, culture, and health books.
